assertions.rationale: The response implements TestAuthHandler extending AuthenticationHandler<AuthenticationSchemeOptions> with HandleAuthenticateAsync.

assertions.assertion: Includes an ITestClaimsProvider (or equivalent) interface that allows setting claims per-test
assertions.rationale: Defines ITestClaimsProvider interface and TestClaimsProvider class with SetClaims/ClearClaims/GetClaims methods.

assertions.assertion: The WebApplicationFactory registers the test auth scheme via AddAuthentication and AddScheme
Shows a test that calls ClearClaims (or equivalent) and asserts 401 Unauthorized
Does NOT disable authorization entirely — authorization policies remain active
assertions.rationale: Only replaces authentication; the response explicitly notes authorization policies remain fully active.
